content.fact_text: Implementation of a Kafka messaging client utilizing kafkajs and opossum for fault-tolerant event-driven messaging.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides a robust, circuit-breaker protected Kafka client implementation for asynchronous communication. Manages producer/consumer lifecycle and ensures reliable message serialization.
interfaces: publish(topic: string, key: string, message: any): Promise<void>
createConsumer(groupId: string, topic: string, eachMessage: (payload: { topic: string; partition: number; message: any }) => Promise<void>): Promise<Consumer>
provenance_data.utility: Enables reliable, asynchronous communication between microservices using event-driven patterns with built-in fault tolerance.
